title: galium verum var. kuetzingii
intro: Galium verum var. kuetzingii, also known as the Kuetzing's bedstraw or yellow bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium) with yellow flowers. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating urinary tract problems. Herbal preparations of Galium verum var. kuetzingii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
